candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; equals Net Sales in preview and is the clearest total revenue line.
Also a valid top-line revenue label; identical values to Total Revenue and may be used in some years.
This is a cost line, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Direct cost line and best semantic match for COGS.
Also a direct cost line; same values as Cost of Goods Sold in populated years.
Possible alternate COGS label in some years.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not period COGS expense.

candidates.row_label: Finished goods and goods for resale
candidates.why: Inventory balance, not period COGS expense.

variables.notes: Using COGS labels as a priority list to handle label changes over time; do not sum them.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component.
Clear SG&A overhead component.
Residual operating overhead bucket; not a total row.
Explicit D&A and should be excluded from SG&A components per instructions.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A total row is present. Selected overhead component rows and excluded depreciation/amortization and totals.

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line and best match.
Likely alternate R&D expense label in other years.
D&A component within R&D, not the full R&D expense line.
Amortization line, not core R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Using R&D labels as a priority list; excluded D&A/amortization and balance sheet asset lines.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; acceptable fallback if no pure interest expense is available.
Best direct interest expense label.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Only a component of interest expense, not preferred as the main line.
Not specifically interest expense.
Direct interest expense label but appears unpopulated in preview; still a valid alternate label if present in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest component, not preferred main interest line.

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer pure interest expense; use broader financial expenses only as fallback.

candidates.why: Income statement earnings line, not book equity.
Valid total equity line.
Valid total equity line and populated across multiple years; best available BE proxy.
Includes minority interest, so not preferred for BE when BE should exclude MIB.
Balancing row, not a reported equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total liabilities and equity, not equity alone.

variables.notes: No parent-only equity or explicit non-controlling interest balance sheet line is available. Using total equity as BE priority list.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not a balance sheet minority interest/equity balance.
Income statement allocation line, not a balance sheet minority interest/equity balance.
Combined equity total, not standalone minority interest; using it for MIB would double count against BE.

variables.notes: No standalone balance sheet non-controlling interest/minority interest line is present. Because BE uses total equity, MIB is set to [] to avoid double counting.
